prompt: Create a cinematic full-body studio group photo of a fictional four-member alternative synth-rock band named Neon Nocturne. The lineup has exactly 4 people standing shoulder-to-shoulder in a moody industrial photo studio: 1) far left, a tall slim man with shoulder-length wavy dark hair, wearing a deep burgundy velvet blazer over a black button-up shirt, black skinny jeans, and black leather boots, hands in pockets; 2) front center, the lead singer, a tall confident woman with short platinum-silver hair, wearing a cropped black leather motorcycle jacket, dark burgundy tank top, high-waisted black tailored trousers, pointed black ankle boots, and silver rings, standing slightly forward with one hand near the jacket; 3) right-center, a petite woman with a sleek black bob haircut, wearing a shiny teal satin bomber jacket over a dark top, short black pleated skirt, sheer black tights, and chunky black platform combat boots, standing close behind the lead singer; 4) far right, a tall broad man with a shaved head, wearing a loose charcoal knit sweater, black cargo pants, chunky black boots, and a small hoop earring, hands in pockets. Use a dark concrete wall and glossy concrete floor, with visible colored stage lights on stands: magenta/pink light glowing from the left and cyan/blue light glowing from the right, plus small warm floor lights near the background. The lighting should create dramatic rim highlights, haze, soft smoke, reflections on the floor, and a high-end music promo photography look. Keep the wardrobe mostly black with burgundy and teal accents, edgy but polished. Vertical 2:3 composition, full bodies visible, realistic photography, sharp clothing detail, shallow atmospheric depth, no text, no logo, no album cover typography.
